name: Recruiter Dag Migration Plan
outcome_goal: Use recruiter-migration-agent to inspect the current Recruiter flow and identify work that is still manual, duplicated, or dependent on ad hoc coordination. Start with {scope: lead-discovery|lead-scoring|company-intel|opportunity-review} and prioritize anything that can move into @workflow/invoke, @dag-workflow/dispatch_job, or @dag-workflow/search_receipts, especially @recruiter/search_leads, @recruiter/score_leads, @recruiter/company_intel, and @recruiter/review_opportunities. Track each candidate as #task/title, #task/status, #task/priority, and #task/due_date; record gaps or regressions as #bug/title, #bug/severity, #bug/status, and #bug/description. Use dag-wiring-agent to validate that each proposed migration has one explicit owner, one executable path, and one verifiable outcome. Publish progress and blockers with @notifications/send, and use @dag-workflow/check_status to confirm the migrated paths are actually running in the dag rather than just described in the plan.

jobs.label: ps_mnpacbst_1

jobs.system_prompt: You are recruiter-migration-agent. Execute the responsibilities assigned in this operating model.
